subject: new world network/enron net works nda

emails.subject: FW: New World Network/Enron Net Works NDA
emails.subject_base: New World Network/Enron Net Works NDA
emails.body: Tana Peter's message below contains a form of NDA that was provided to New World by both EBS and Enron Puerto Rico. While I realize they are not Net Works, if this form is acceptable, do we have to have special approval from ENW management to use a different form? Let me know because I have no problem with the attached form and need to finalize this for Peter. Thanks. Mark Senior Counsel, ENA Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3940 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com Forwarded by Mark Greenberg/NA/Enron on 03/23/2001 12:36 PM Peter Feltman/ENRON@enronXgate 03/13/2001 05:22 PM

emails.subject: Re: FW: New World Network/Enron Net Works NDA
emails.subject_base: New World Network/Enron Net Works NDA
emails.body: Re: FW: New World Network/Enron Net Works NDA You, as counsel, can agree to any form of NDA you think is acceptable. I will print it out and bring it around for signature Mark Greenberg@ENRON 03/23/2001 12:38 PM
